title: Register — Formal & Informal
topics: formal · informal · neutral · contractions · vocabulary level
description: Formální vs neformální angličtina — stejná myšlenka, jiný styl.

vocabulary.cz: informal: I want to / I'd like to

vocabulary.en: formal: I am writing to enquire
vocabulary.cz: informal: I'm getting in touch about

vocabulary.en: formal: I would be grateful if
formal: due to the fact that

examples.en: I look forward to hearing from you.
examples.cz: Hope to hear from you soon.

tasks: 1. Rewrite these in the opposite register (formal ↔ informal):
2. Write the same message in 3 registers: text to a friend, email to a manager,
3. Find 5 phrasal verbs from lesson 26 and replace them with formal equivalents
